name: cxs-cloner
description: CLI tool to clone and modify Codex sessions

scripts.red-verify: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck
scripts.verify: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.guard:no-test-changes: git diff --name-only test/ | grep . && echo 'ERROR: Test files were modified during Green phase' && exit 1 || true
scripts.green-verify: bun run verify && bun run guard:no-test-changes

author: Lee Moore <lee@liminal.ai>
